title: Release test security audit
scope: Bitcoin descriptor, PSBT, hardware-wallet, and chain-data packages
Wallet auth, vault, proposal, signing, broadcast, logging, and telemetry boundaries
Supabase migrations, RLS policies, Edge Functions, CORS, and operational logging helpers
GitHub Actions, release audit tooling, production config verification, Vercel build paths, and public OSS export controls

publicSummary: Asylia reviewed the release/test promotion candidate with a wider wallet, Supabase, package, release, and publication audit. Follow-up hardening centralises BIP-48 enforcement, removes hardware-wallet vendor payloads from console logs, and records broadcast state server-side.

publication.summary: This report is public-safe. It does not disclose secrets, private user data, descriptors, xpub sets, PSBTs, UTXO data, raw transactions, or exploit instructions.
